creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
I do not see one bundled in the sources, so maybe ask upstream to
provide one?  If there is one please provide a patch to install it.
The port has no maintainer at the moment.

Otherwise the port provides some documentation in
/usr/local/share/doc/snort.

> $ pwd
> /usr/share/man
> $ find . -type f | grep snort

FYI, this is all wrong.  Ports install manuals under /usr/local/man,
not /usr/share/man where only base system manuals are installed to.
